entry.title: Copy results from lot with Insp. Type 03 to the lot with Insp. type 04.
entry.content:
I am trying to copy inspection result from lot with insp. type 03 to the lot with insp. type 04, Please suggest how can I use this selection procedure here on s4hana public cloud as user exit is not available here in public cloud, As per SAP replied "300– Custom selection of inspection lot" selection procedure is not available in S4hana public cloud.

Can you please let me know how can I achieved it s4hana public cloud ??????

entry.title: 回复： SAP Community - Where are you from?
entry.content:
Hi everyone

I am from China，currently living in Jiaxing，it is about 2 hours from Shanghai.

I was born in a city of ancient and has a history over 5000 years until now.

I came here for studying more SAP technology knowledge and sharing my feelings and experiences.

I am very interested in EWM product component.

Ken

entry.title: Re: How to Generate and Download PDFs on the fly without persisting in CAP Application(Node.js)
entry.content: Thanks for this detail info.

entry.title: Re: change log in Manage Purchase Contracts
entry.content:
Hi,

You can see the change log of contracts in Display Purchase Contract(ME33K) webgui tile.

Or you can also use the App Display Change Documents.

Best Regards and Thanks.

entry.title: Re: Ariba Sourcing Master Data - Payload Request Successful but no data in Master Data Search
entry.content: Hi All, We are facing same issue as above we could see the data in transaction tracker & in Ariba Administration Master Payload Request the Status "Scheduled" since long time. Can anyone help me out why the payload got stuck in Schedule Stage.

entry.title: Re: Dynamic Planning Area extension for SAP Analytics Cloud
entry.content: Thank you Sarau - I didn't spot that one on the roadmap, that's great news.

entry.title: Re: can inspection lot results be carried to other plant...
entry.content:
Check your Customizing  for combination of movement type (e.g. 101/311) + Movement Indicator B [purchase order] + Receipt indicator X [STO]. Look for value of inspection lot origin (Table T156S, View V_T156SC_OIA)

(In some case a 101 movement code for GR would not create inspection lot when a 311, would.)

entry.title: Re: FMS Item Code from OITM UDF in Sales Quotation
entry.content:
Do I understand correctly that you enter Catalogue number in UDF, and you want the system to pull Item Code based on that number? Why not simply use standard SAP catalogue numbers? It will surely work faster.

The query seems fine at first glance, other than you missed T0 after OITM (should be FROM OITM T0). It shouldn't lose value after tab.

entry.title: Re: SAP Cloud Integration - CSV Import in Value Mapping
entry.content: We have some target values in valuemapping containing a komma ',' as a character. Is there away to escape the komma in the value in the csv?

entry.title: Re: pay components deleted in manage pending hires reappe...
entry.content:
@Ssindhuja @nlgro023 

Hi I am atsu.

I have encountered the same problem that deleting pay component from initiator or inflight change during workflow does not affect and reappear pay component that aleady deleted after approving workflow.

Do you have any reason and solution to resolve it?

thank you as always.

entry.title: No company found contact your system administrator
entry.content:
Dear All,
I did setup SAP Cloud on premise, Cloud Control Center for SAPB1 Version 1.10 SP00 PL17 and SAP B1 version 10 FP2111 , all the while it is running ok, until today it start give problem.
When I login SAP B1, it prompt an error (No company found; contact your system administrator).
I found out, this issue will be solved after i restart SAP Business One SLD Service, but it is only work for 10 minutes. After that, if try login again, it will prompt the same error again, and if restart the SLD service again, its work  again. 

I suspect the SLD may be got problem, so I upgrade to Cloud Control Center for SAPB1 Version 1.10 SP00 PL18, but still the same error appear, and i need to restart every 10 minutes to allow users login SAP hosted on SAP Cloud.

Seek any help or advice, what should I check for this type of problem.

Thanks in advanced.

Kind regards,
Mat

entry.title: Re: FMS Item Code from OITM UDF in Sales Quotation
entry.content:
Hi @kedalenechong ,

If I got that right, you're trying to trigger an FMS in the ItemCode field based on a UDF previously populated. I suppose this is not achievable as the Item No. (ItemCode) is the Primary Key of any document at the line level, which means that the first data to pass to a line must be the Item No.

Any field you fill in before informing the Item Code will be cleaned out once the PK is passed.

I hope it makes sense.

Regards,
Felipe

entry.title: Re: Split Batch Validation on VL31N/VL32N
entry.content:
Hello @jackyhjj_sn 

You can implement any delivery validations with delivery user-exits as documented with the note 415716 - User exits in delivery processing Alternatively you can use the BAdI enhancement LE_SHP_DELIVERY_PROC.

The message "Specified quantity is greater than the open quantity" is VL287. It is always sent as an information message and can't be customized - include FV50PF0P_POS_GEN_AENDERN_2, form routine position_generiert_aendern_2, line 411:

    IF lo_menge < 0 AND v50agl-chargenfindung IS INITIAL.
*******************************************
*     ARun handling in Delivery document  *
*******************************************
      PERFORM arun_batch_split_validation IN PROGRAM arun_routines_obd IF FOUND
              USING go_arun_obd_process xlips xlips[] lips lo_menge v50agl-chargenfindung
                    v50agl-dialog t180-trtyp xlikp.
*----ARun handling in Delivery documents---*
      save_287_menge = save_287_menge + lo_menge.
      save_287_menge_flo = save_287_menge_flo + local_float.
      lo_menge = 0.
      local_float = 0.
      IF gs_lips_batch-called_by = char2.                   "v_n_1236368
        gs_lips_batch-lgmng = 0.
        gs_lips_batch-lgmng_flo = 0.
      ENDIF.                                                "^_n_1236368
      MESSAGE i287.
    ENDIF.

Best regards

Dominik Tylczynski

entry.title: BTM TMS Transports - SLP_CTS: Error during client creation: Unauthorized
entry.content:
Hello experts,

We've configured TMS to transport iflows between out two environments, but we're stuck with the end phase of the process. When we want to import the component to the destination account we have the next error:

Exception during start of deployment for deploy type 'SLP_CTS': Error during client creation: Unauthorized

The corresponding target destination is created according with the documentation, the url is

https://deploy-service.cfapps.<your DC>.hana.ondemand.com/slprot/<org name on DEV subaccount>/<DEV space name>/slp

The user informed in the destination has the space developer role in the space we want to transport.

Could you give us any clue about the problem?

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Depreciation key for Austria - half year depreciation
entry.content:
Dear all,

can anybody tell which depreciation key can be used for Local Gaap Austria (half year depreciation) 

Example:

Acquisition date 3.3. - depreciation beginns 1.1.

Acquisition date 11.11. - depreciation beginns 1.7

In Public Cloud LINS is used in standard which is wrong to me! 

kR

entry.title: Re: Practical introduction to SAP HANA Cloud Vector Engine
entry.content:
Hi Erik, 

They are examples. The real ones have a lot more dimensions in the strings passed to TO_REAL_VECTOR, 300 numbers to be exact. I've removed to simplify the example (please note the ellipsis on the examples)

TO_REAL_VECTOR('[0.005068,-0.023730,-0.062008,-0.053183, ...

 Kind regards.

entry.title: Re: Killer Cycle
entry.content:
@Sandra_Solis wrote:

... I forgot to comment out a debugging loop I used to check if everything was okay.

Feeling confident, I asked the client to transport the program to PRD. As soon as they executed the job, it started consuming all the system memory until the entire system collapsed...

How did that happen though?

  • The amount of memory allocated to a thread is less than the total memory available. 
  • A debugging loop usually doesn't contain any executable code, so why was all the memory consumed.
  • And why didn't the issue show up in testing?

I'm not doubting you. I'm just puzzled.

entry.title: 如何使用SOAP调用创建同步日记账分录？
Re: Application set-up and basic understanding of DDMRP designed for SAP S/4HANA On-Premise
entry.content: how can i activate this or i don't need to use it to show results ?

entry.title: Re: How to Generate a formatted excel in background and send it as an email using ixml method
entry.content:
Or you could just use abap2xlsx

https://github.com/abap2xlsx/abap2xlsx

entry.title: Re: SAP CodeJam HANA ML In 's-Hertogenbosch 2024-06 Recap
entry.content:
I have 2 questions left

  1. What is the similarity between SAP, HANA and the Titanic
  2. Was our host Vitaliy the Jedi Master and we his padawans? Or was it the other way around?

Listen to this episode to find out.

📺 https://youtu.be/Qm9zEeX6J88?si=XV5FoCvwkDUg6xnX 

🔊 https://podcasters.spotify.com/pod/show/hana-cafe-nl/episodes/Recap-SAP-CodeJam-Machine-Learning-using-SAP-HANA-with-Vitaliy-and-Rakesh-S09E06-e2l9e47

entry.title: What's New with SAP Datasphere in Q2, 2024?
entry.content:
💫Join the SAP Datasphere product management team for the session and get the latest information about features and functions delivered in Q2 2024. You can ask the product experts in the Q&A section live during the session and will get an overview on the upcoming features planned for 2024.

The session will cover the following topics:
👉 General product updates
👉 Updates in data integration
👉 Updates in data modeling, catalog and consumption
👉 Updates in administration and security
👉 Updates on business content and SAP BW bridge
👉 Outlook

We look forward to seeing you!!

entry.title: Re: Submissions for "SAP HANA Cloud multi-model" developer challenge: Week 3 - Image Embed
entry.content:
Hello,

Here is my submission:

entry.title: Re: SAP-VAT CODE-PURCHASE REQUEST
entry.content:
Hi @diego76 ,

Do you have any Tax Code Determination rule covering this scenario? You can either default the tax code in your Supplier BP, as already answered here, or create a more specific rule in the Tax Code Determination. Both should trigger the Tax Code in the PR.

Regards,
Felipe

entry.title: Re: SAP script error checking
entry.content:
Hi Paul!

I think your question doesn't relate to SAP Emarsys Scripting Language (ESL). ESL is used for creating dynamic personalized content in marketing campaigns in Emarsys. Please double check the Tags and assign the relevant one so that an other subject matter expert can help you with an answer. 

Thank you!

entry.title: Re: Split Batch Validation on VL31N/VL32N
entry.content:
Hi @raymond_giuseppi , thanks for your prompt reply.
we are not using those config, as per our understanding, those configs is the tolerance for PO Qty with Delivery Qty.
But in my case, we want to validate the amount of initial delivery quantity with the total of the split batch quantity.

entry.title: Re: Errors when posting in program RLLI2100
entry.content: hey, I'm too getting same error in EHP8 system in ZG51 TCODE . How did you solve this?

entry.title: Missing permission to cancel Time Payout
entry.content:
Hello experts

I have configured the process of Time Account Payout. Everything is working okay, with the request being made, a workflow being triggered and approved. The problem is that, if for some reason, the employee wants to cancel a request (approved or not) he/she gets an error message saying 'No permission to correct object'. 

 

What are the permissions that I need to add to make this possible? 

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Re: Buttons missing in edocument cockpit
entry.content:
That the colleague said and also can help you to understand that is explained in 2530509 - Electronic Document Processing Framework Troubleshooting Guide:

D30 - Missing 'submit' and/or 'send to customer' buttons in the cockpit or error 'Action SUBMIT is not allowed for country/region': to solve this refer to SAP Help documentation Activation Requirements for Features in SAP Document and Reporting Compliance and activate the business function based upon the licensing you have.

D31 - In one system, the advanced feature buttons(SUBMIT, STATUS etc.) are appearing in edoc_cockpit without activating any business function but it is not appearing in other systems: We have unblocked advanced features for countries/processes which are already productive by inserting system generated entries in EDODCUSAGE table but for new ones, it is mandatory to activate business function based upon your licensing (Refer topic D30).

entry.title: Re: Hide Inactive Banks
entry.content:
Hi @maria_cuevas ,

Sorry, It is not clear to me what you want to achieve. Could you please supply us with more details? A few screenshots would be helpful as well.

We have Bank Accounts, House Bank Accounts, and Bank G/L Accounts. At least within the UK localization, only the latter can be set up as inactive.

Regards,
Felipe

entry.title: Re: Import SAP BW users in SAC using SAP IPS
entry.content:
Thanks, looks solid.

There is another blog going in this direction as well: https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/sap-analytics-cloud-replicating-bw-analysis-authorizations-into-dimension/ba-p/13521361

entry.title: Re: SAP B1 10 why items weight and size are mandatory?
entry.content:
Hi @patrice_vigier ,

Could you please supply a few screenshots of the message you get when trying it?

I can't think of any settings to make these fields mandatory.

Regards,
Felipe

entry.title: Re: Cloud Connector License Refresh
entry.content:
Indeed, the Cloud Connector does not require any license!!

So this article is quite confusing.

entry.title: Re: Connecting SAP Build apps trail version with the S/4 hana system
entry.content: The error message tells it. You have not set up a Cloud Connector between BTP Destination and on-premise S/4. Without it, BTP cannot access your private SAP network.

entry.title: Customer & Partner Roundtable for SAP BTP ABAP Environment #14
entry.content:
👉 The call for contributions for one of the upcoming roundtables is open! 

 

If you want to show a demo or share a use case scenario for SAP BTP ABAP Environment send us an email and we will get back to you.
 

Introduction

 

As SAP BTP ABAP environment (aka Steampunk) and ABAP Cloud became more and more popular inside and outside of SAP, there is a high demand for rolling out the latest product news and updates, asking questions, and of course showing demos. 

💡 If you weren’t able to join one of our previous roundtables, you can find the slides presented, recordings, and further references in this GitHub repository.


Meeting Information

When:                                                                      
  • July 30th, 10:00 - 11:00 AM CET  – Zoom Meeting (please register in advance) 
 
Who:
  • All interested customers, partners, and stakeholders are invited to join and exchange ideas and feedback with others and the product team
  • Steampunk team: Frank Jentsch (Product Lead for SAP BTP ABAP Environment), Daniela Fenderl, Chris Swanepoel, Iwona Hahn & Burcu Karlidag 

Preliminary Agenda:
  • Product news and outlook
  • Hello, ABAP Cloud! Landing Page
  • Q&A
Looking forward to meeting you!
 


Check out our SAP Business Technology ABAP Environment page in SAP Community for product updates and upcoming events.

entry.title: Wron application startet
entry.content:
Hello

I have the problem that I have selected several documents via CV04N. Now I double-click on a document info record and the originals are displayed.
If I double-click on the pdf again, I get an error message that the document type does not exist and there is no corresponding application.
However, the document type and application exist.
What could be the reason for this?

BR Uli

entry.title: Why is enterprise structure set for both position (infotype 8) and employee (infotype 2)?
entry.content: I wonder if storing enterprise structure data in infotype 2 of pa30 is not redundant. I mean an employee will always hold a position and the postion has this information stored in infotype 8 of po13.

entry.title: Re: Award Multiple quotations for RFQ
entry.content: Today the same question also comes to my mind although I have created the situation multiple times. Just want to know more of the business intention behind this. And I have found the note 3377607.

entry.title: Re: Welcome to our SAP Learning Group moderated by SAP Learning Experts
entry.content:
Hi @Avinesh_Sundar 
Nice to meet you! 
Please post your question regarding regarding to share resources for SAP SuccessFactors Onboarding 2.0 and SAP Datasphere in our SAP Learning Q&A. 
This makes it easier  to follow-up:
That way other learners can benefit from the answer:
If you ask the question there other learners  can search for it in the future if they run into the same issue and there we have more features available for responses.
Would you mind to repost it ?

Kind regards
Margit

Kind regards

Margit

Kind regards

Brecht

entry.title: I can`t Post Goods receipt
entry.content:
親愛なる友人、

「購買伝票の入庫転記アプリ」（TDD環境）で入庫転記をしたいのですが、すでに 
購買発注登録が完了しています。
次のエラーが表示されます

■勘定52041000には原価計算に関連する勘定割当が必要です

しかし、アカウント52041000は使用しておらず 、原価計算の入力フィールドがありません。
このエラーを解決する方法を教えてください。

よろしくお願いします。

#S/4 HANA Cloud

entry.title: Re: Company logo not visible on Enable Now Template Custo...
entry.content: Thanks Dirk for your reply! I figured the problem was: the logo should comply to the following size

entry.title: 回复： SAP Community - Where are you from?
entry.content: Welcome @KenWang - perhaps you've already joined the Shanghai group here on SAP Community? I would also recommend that you subscribe to the managed tags for the SAP EWM related topics.

entry.title: Re: Branded MDK Client Android apk size
entry.content:
<application
    android:extractNativeLibs="true"
In AndroidManifest.xml set extractNativeLibs to true and then generate build.

entry.title: Display illustrated message in list report page if the list is empty
entry.content:
I have a fiori elements application with list page and object page. I am using cds annotations to display the fields

If there are no rows to be displayed in the list report I want to show an illustrated message of no data. Is this possible? If this is possible how can we achieve this?

entry.title: Re: Rest Rule Period configuration
entry.content:
I don´t think that you can expect that someone copy and paste his work here. I think you need to do a bit on your own.

What to do to create rest rules is step-by-step explained in the time tracking documentation.

You can find also some examples in our best practice content delivery - I think the rest rules are included for Germany for example.

Best regards

Volker

entry.title: Automatic email sent to the customer informing them about the date for the next intervention
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I'am new on SAP FSM and i'am trying to learn the basics, so i had a task to create a business rule that allow to sent an automatic email to the customer informing them about the date for the next intervention with condition: as soon as activity is released, send the customer the date and time of technician's intervention.

could any one help me to to create business rule for this task?
thank you

entry.title: Re: NWBC 8 SAP Business Client 8 - how to disable headers ?
entry.content:
Hi,

if the settings you are looking for are the following:

ShowGuiCaption and EnableQuickLaunch

you could set them to false in your configuration file:

ShowGuiCaption and EnableQuickLaunch

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_BUSINESS_CLIENT/f526c7c14c074e7b9d18c4fd0c88c593/7d5ee8343d91495a8d3bf6ed8d19ac63.html?q=option%20file

Regards,

Sandra

entry.title: Re: Outbound Communication to S4 On-Premise(OData) from B...
entry.content: @thomaswiegand Thanks a lot for your suggestions @Ulrich_Schmidt Thanks a lot for guiding me in the right direction and your solution.

entry.title: SWEC filter restrictions - filter for adding new item to/deleting item from Sales order
entry.content:
Hello experts,

I have done all the customization for triggering events using SAP NetWeaver event enablement Ad-on. The events are now getting triggered for Sales order creation and sales order change.

The events however need to be triggered based on certain conditions. I had two other questions regarding SWEC field restrictions for event trigger.

  1. I want the sales order change to get triggered under multiple conditions. One of them is when there is new item added or when an item id deleted from the sales order. I am unable to find a way to add this condition into SWEC.
  2. There is also a custom field in VBAK (ZZPB) which needs to be checked and the event should be triggered only when this custom field has specific values. 

So, I have put the conditions as below in SWEC

(&VBAK_ZZPB_NEW& = SO-MTS OR &VBAK_ZZPB_NEW& = SO-MTO)

AND

(&VBAK_VDATU_OLD& NE &VBAK_VDATU_NEW& OR

&VBAP_ZMENG_OLD& NE &VBAP_ZMENG_NEW& OR

&VBEP_EDATU_OLD& NE &VBEP_EDATU_NEW& OR

&VBEP_LDDAT_OLD& NE &VBEP_LDDAT_NEW& OR

&VBEP_MBDAT_OLD& NE &VBEP_MBDAT_NEW& OR

&VBEP_TDDAT_OLD& NE &VBEP_TDDAT_NEW& OR

(&VBPA_PARVW_OLD& = SH AND &VBPA_PARNR_OLD& NE &VBPA_PARNR_NEW&)

)

This condition works only if I take off the VBAK-ZZPB conditions. Once the VBAK-ZZPB condition is added, the conditional triggering ceases to work. Any ideas on how to resolve this.

 

Your inputs are highly appreciated!

Thanks,

Smohan

entry.title: Re: Outbound Communication to S4 On-Premise(OData) from B...
entry.content: To find out, where exactly the accidental switch from https/443 to http/80 is happening, we would need to look at the logs of the Connectivity Agent (and perhaps also the logs of the HTTP Client used by the application).

entry.title: Insights SAP S/4HANA Embedded Analytics
entry.content:
A key benefit of SAP S/4HANA is the users’ ability to access real-time information to support decisions, directly in the Cloud ERP business processes. In this session, we will cover the Embedded Analytics that are available, and discuss strategies towards successful implementation.

Speaker: Jey Ping, Executive Advisor, SAP S/4HANA, SAP America 

Registration link: https://events.sap.com/transformation/en/home#240718

entry.title: Re: Learning new UX - blank Catalog Search no longer avai...
entry.content:
Deep links, custom cards and banners are all great as is the filtering functionality however simple ability for users and espcially Admins to search ALL content should be available.  Moving towards recommendations and suggestions driven by AI is great but again the core search should return all results - thats how we work here in my organisation too.  It in fact builds more trust in the tool and also helps with testing library content.

see and vote for this via Improvement Request Details - Customer Influence (sap.com)

 Improvement Request Details - Customer Influence

(sap.com), https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#/idea/322382/?section=sectionDetails

entry.title: Re: Learning new UX - blank Catalog Search no longer avai...
entry.content: I have the same requirement as @LilyL - we want to create deep links to our courses that are free first so use nothing but Source in the deep link. Thanks @DWurm, any instructions on how you generated that link will be good but will it work once the old homepage is no longer available?

entry.title: System is not displaying any data for Production Order :Number and Quantities report
entry.content:
The report "Production Order : Number and Quantities" not working, without filter the report is empty !!


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: System is not displaying any data for Production Orde...
entry.content:
This report is built following restrictions on the parameters Operation Type: Make and Product Type: Main Product. In case the Production Order does not match these parameters, it will not be displayed.

Kindly refer KBA: 3226591 - Report "Production Order: Number and Quantities" missing data. https://me.sap.com/notes/3226591

entry.title: Re: SAP DM - How to lock an order
entry.content: In addition to that, you can also put Orders and SFCs on hold. See: Manage Holds at https://help.sap.com/docs/sap-digital-manufacturing/execution/manage-holds and Putting a Release on Hold at https://help.sap.com/docs/sap-digital-manufacturing/execution/releasing-orders which might also make sense to you, depending on your specific requirements. Br, Manoel

entry.title: How is the patch algorithm for CL_ABAP_DIFF?
entry.content:
I was exploring the new system class CL_ABAP_DIFF which detects differences between internal tables. According to the documentation, its return value is a diff table, to be understood as a sequence of instructions that have to be applied to the source table in order to get the target table. 

Unfortunately, my naïve approach to write a `patch` algorithm for applying the diff data to the source table doesn't work. 

       loop at lt_diff assigning field-symbol(<ls_diff>).
         case <ls_diff>-operation.
           when cl_abap_diff=>s_operation-delete.
             delete lt_source index <ls_diff>-source_line_number.
           when cl_abap_diff=>s_operation-insert.
             insert lt_target[ <ls_diff>-target_line_number ] 
               into lt_source index <ls_diff>-source_line_number.
           when cl_abap_diff=>s_operation-update.
             modify lt_source 
               from lt_target[ <ls_diff>-target_line_number ] 
               index <ls_diff>-source_line_number.
         endcase.
       endloop.

Any suggestions how to fix this patch algorithm so that after the loop we have lt_source = lt_target?

entry.title: Re: How to update Calculated Measure based on Page or Inp...
entry.content: Hi @N1kh1l Thanks for the reply. I assume the present SAC release will not support to maintain 2 calculated measures with same description because Calculated measure at story level and there is no Name ID to make use of same description . As mentioned by @William_Yu, need to wait for SAC release 2024 QRC3( wave 2024.10).

entry.title: Re: SAP DM - How to lock an order
entry.content: Yes, you should definitely be able to define a custom XSLT logic to perform auto-release (<QuantityToRelease>all</QuantityToRelease>) depending on the IDOC material for the workflows Production Order Download (LOIPRO05 V2) or Process Order Download (LOIPRO05 V2).

entry.title: Re: Hybrid Testing w/ Postgres issue
entry.content:
Try to specify the actual service name as an argument.

If your service on BTP is named my-pg-db, your command would look like:

cds bind -2 my-pg-db postgresql-db

=> postgresql-db being the service technical name.

entry.title: Enter intervals without overlaps
entry.content: I am getting error as Enter intervals without overlaps in material range creation. Also also how to find which material range is available. please help in this matter as i am getting same error even after applying different ranges.

entry.title: Re: Replenishment Using Run Schedule Quantities: Integrating REM & Event Driven Kanban with SAP EWM
entry.content:
Hello @shailesh_mishra5 

Can you please clarify how the components will get consumed? Does system will create OBD to post the consumption after IBD is GR is posted?

Kanban card is showing empty means there is no stock then how consumption will be posted? Does PK41 creates both IBD(To receive final product) and OBD(To consume the component).

Also let us know if we can use any stock transfer strategy in CC so that WT can also be created in integration with E-D Kanban. Because system allows to create such CC in system.

Please clarify.

entry.title: Re: Final Review Step in Onboarding 2.0 Process
entry.content:
@SachinPachauri 

 

Great blog!

But I have a doubt:

When it gets to the "Final Review" step, the person in charge sees the same as in the "NHDR".

How can I do so that in the "Final Review" I see the custom MDFs that I complete in Onboardee?

Thanks

@Gopinath

entry.title: Re: How to update Calculated Measure based on Page or Inp...
entry.content: @Vasu_Sac, Just keep a space at the end in one of the measures and they both will visually look the same.

entry.title: SAP PP-EWM Inbound delivery
entry.content:
Hi,

There is an integration between PP and EWM. So when we confirm Production order, Inbound delivery is created and transferred to EWM. 

Normal process is following and no problems here:

1. Production order A > Confirmation 1 > Inbound Delivery X item 010 (Material AAA)

2. Production order A > Confirmation 2 > Inbound Delivery Y item 010 (Material AAA)

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Problem can happen when for the same production order there are stuck entries in CO16N:

1. Production order A > Confirmation 1 > stuck in CO16N

2. Production order A > Confirmation 2 > stuck in CO16N

3. Push the entries from CO16N. As result only one delivery is created for both entries and have two goods receipt items:

Inbound Delivery X - item 010 (Material AAA)

Inbound Delivery X - item 020 (Material AAA)

The question - is it possible to create two Inbound deliveries for each item after processing CO16N instead of one Inbound delivery for both items?

 

Kind regards,

entry.title: How to edit document types in SSCUI 101522?
entry.content:
I need to edit the standard document types


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to edit document types in SSCUI 101522?
entry.content: Please note it's not possible to edit standard document types, but you can select 'Copy As' to create your own custom document types (which must start with either Y or Z by naming convention).

entry.title: How To Handle snotes which can't be implemented during the SUM Execution.
entry.content:
Scenario:

Imagine, when we are using the Software Update Manager (SUM) to maintain a system (Say QAS/PRD), and the SUM asks you to apply some SAP Notes as a pre-step.

You have already tried to apply these notes in a preceding system (say DEV) before, and you know that the notes are not applicable. It’s just that SUM does not know the status of these note implementations. However, since they were not applied, they are not transported from DEV to QAS/PRD ( As downloading of these notes is explicitly enabled in the DEV environment and is disabled in the QAS/PRD), so SUM asks for them again in QAS/PRD.

Hence, You do not want to open the system for a connection to SAP Service Marketplace only to make the notes known in the system – especially in the PRD System as it's not an ideal scenario.

 

Solution

The solution would be to provide the not-applicable SAP Notes to SUM by using the following procedure.


Here, It transports the not-applicable SAP Notes from one system to another:

  1. First, Apply the corrections attached to the note (1788379).
  2. Download all the notes requested by the SUM in the Dev System using SNOTE.
  3. Implement All the Notes with the status "Can be Implemented" in the  Dev System and include it in the Transport.
  4. For the Notes with the status "Cannot be implemented", Use Report "SCWN_TRANSPORT_NOTES" to assign them transport request.
  5. Release and transport the transport request(s) to the next system QAS/PRD. later, Import the request into QAS/PRD.

The figure below shows the SNOTE download/Configuration in 3 system landscape:

 

Result

As a result of the above steps, SUM will know the status of these notes and SUM will not ask you to download these SAP Notes anymore in the QAS/PRD.

Note

ℹ How to use the report SCWN_TRANSPORT_NOTES is explained in SAP Note 1788379.

entry.title: Re: New 1H 2024 SAP Successfactors Time (Tracking) Features
entry.content: @nltlo2 : thanks for the feedback. I have no idea why you don´t have access. You probably need to address this to the community organizers here

entry.title: PARTS INVOICED DIFFERENT FROM PARTS ON SALES ORDER
entry.content:
Hello team,

I am looking for the SAP way of handling below issue I am facing. We have a ZCDS Sales order raised that got converted in the PO and shared with the supplier. 

But the supplier invoiced the new part. For example, we ordered 3018761 (superseded) but supplier invoiced 3015321 (new part). Unfortunately, we receipted the old part number in the system and it got invoiced out. 

Now the issue is that the finance team cannot match the part on supplier invoice against the part receipted in SAP. 

Is there a standard way of correcting this in SAP 4 HANA?

Thanks!

Loic

entry.title: Re: Tips and Tricks Best Practice: Annual Leave Accrual Recalculation based on different leave limit
entry.content: Another stroke of genius from Neelesh !

entry.title: Re: DocEntry hyper link not working
entry.content: Hi Lothar

entry.title: Re: F4 Help in Custom Analytic Query
entry.content:
@ankesh_jindal4 

Please try adding @ObjectModel.foreignKey.association: '_AssociationTarget' in the underlying cube view. 

In the example below, I_Material will be used for value help.

 

define view I_SalesOrderItem 
  association [0..1] to I_Material as _Material 
    on $projection.Material = _Material.Material ... { 
      @ObjectModel.foreignKey.association: ’_Material’
      Material,
      _Material, ...
}

entry.title: Re: SAP script error checking
entry.content: Thanks, I'll have a look!

entry.title: Re: DocEntry hyper link not working
entry.content: Hi Lothar Thanks so much for your answer, it is almost perfect except I need GRPO Number as well?

entry.title: Microsoft Outlook (version 2405) rendering issues
entry.content:
Hi, 

Has anyone had any issues with the New Microsoft Outlook (version 2405). We've noticed that the rendering is poor, with spacing and button placement completely different to that shown in the preview in Content Studio? I'd say this is solely a Microsoft issue but strangely the same email sent from our different emailing tool (Spotler) renders as expected. Interested to know if anyone else has had the issue. 

Thanks,
Chris

entry.title: Re: Scan barcode to enter serial number in delivery document
entry.content: thank you for your response. for now we are going to use the 2D scanner after we point the cursor to the serial number field. This seems to be working for now as not a lot of products are serialized.

entry.title: Re: Automatic email sent to the customer informing them a...
entry.content:
Hi there,

I would recommend to checkout https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_FIELD_SERVICE_MANAGEMENT/fsm_admin/fsmevents.html

 

There is ActivityReleasedEvent mentioned that could be used.

In the documentation it says: “[...] we strongly recommend using business rules of type THREE with ActivityReleasedEvent in case you want to define a trigger based on releasing activities.”

 

With that trigger you probably do not need to care about a condition and can define any action you want.

 

Best regards,

Stefanie

entry.title: Re: Test Automation Software
entry.content:
Hi,

besides Test Automation Tool that is embedded in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition and integrated with SAP Cloud ALM we have Tricentis Test Automation to support all other SAP Solutions for automated Testing and is also integration with SAP Cloud ALM.

Mor details can be found here:

https://support.sap.com/en/alm/sap-cloud-alm/implementation.html?anchorId=section_111831259

Regards Reiner

entry.title: Control During data load via GRDC
entry.content:
Hi  All

1. How can the user know when did last data got loaded via GRDC? We can always go to Group Data Analysis app to see the updated data in Group reporting or have the technical team look into the data entry timing via ACDOCU table. But is there a standard control feature provided by SAP. Also has anyone added a custom task to enable such a control?

2. The above query is also relevant for data entry via GRDC forms

Thanks & regards

entry.title: Re: Qm instection lot status "MCAN"
entry.content: Hello everyone, I managed to reproduce the issue by setting the CMAT status and then canceling the lot. However, instead of canceling it, the system marks the lot for cancellation.

entry.title: FLEET MANAGEMENT IN PUBLIC CLOUD FOR ASSET MANAGEMENT
entry.content:
Hello Team,

Does anyone know , how can we deal with fleet management (vehicle business) SAP S/4HANA Cloud for Asset Management, public edition to cover capabilities relevant for fleet management (fuel consumption, Daily KMR , HMR Report,  specific master data, etc.)

 

is there any chance to upcoming year,  adding this functionality in public cloud,

SAP Asset Strategy and Performance Management PLM Enterprise Asset Management (EAM)/Plant Maintenance (PM) SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition

entry.title: Re: SAP S/4HANA Cloud integration with SAP Integration Suite, Advanced Event Mesh
entry.content:
You can also check out this configuration by following this SAP Tech Bytes video... SAP Tech Bytes: Configuring SAP S/4HANA Cloud and SAP Integration Suite, advanced event mesh

Steps:

  • 00:04 Introduction
  • 00:39 SAP Help documentation
  • 01:43 Maintain Client Certificates in SAP S/4HANA Cloud
  • 02:20 Import default client certificate in AEM
  • 03:22 Download server root certificate
  • 04:02 Create SAP S/4HANA Cloud client username in AEM
  • 05:39 Create Communication system
  • 07:00 Create Communication arrangement (AEM integration scenario - SAP_COM_0492)
  • 11:27 Create Communication arrangement (AEM validation assessment - SAP_COM_0493)
  • 12:13 Create AEM validation service instance in SAP BTP
  • 13:35 Check connection between SAP S/4HANA Cloud and AEM
  • 13:50 Enterprise Event Enablement - Communication channel binding
  • 14:50 Enterprise Event Enablement - Event Monitor (Produce Test event)
  • 15:12 Subscribe to topic in AEM
  • 16:12 Update a Business Partner
  • 18:00 Outro

entry.title: Re: Sending idocs from SAP ECC to Data Services
entry.content:
The error "failed because Data Services no longer supports its format. Regenerate the IDoc file in SAP and replace the file." can be resolved by extracting the XML Schema directly from the SAP system using transaction WE60 > Enter IDoc Name > (Documentation > XML Schema).

Now in SAP Data Services rather than using an IDoc object from the SAP datastore you simply use an XML Nested Schema created from the xsd file exported from SAP System.

entry.title: Join us in shaping the future of mobile procurement!
entry.content:
.

Dear Ariba Community,

Imagine you can:

  • Shop and order from your company’s catalog with a personal AI assistant.
  • Get notified on your smart watch when a contract or sourcing task is assigned to you
  • Approve and monitor requisitions from your employees. 

We would love to hear your feedback on features you need most for your business and also how we can support your rollout of the mobile application to your employees as quickly as possible.

Please use this link to learn more about this CEI and register until 11. July 2024. 

https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#campaign/3734

Hope to see you there!

entry.title: How can we assign MIC in breakdown maintenance order
entry.content:
Hi PM/QM experts,

I am trying to create order manually for breakdown maintenance through IW31. After doing maintenance work, equipment need to be inspected. Is it possible to add Master Inspection Characteristics against operations in the same breakdown maintenance order?

entry.title: Tricentis Test Automation Server for SAP – Server for User Administration
entry.content:
The service for user administration is the option of centrally managing users and group memberships in Tricentis Test Automation for SAP. However, the actual permissions are still set in the Tosca Console directly in the respective project. This block describes how user management and assigning groups and projects works. The installation is done as described in block Tricentis Test Automation Server for SAP - Install... - SAP Community.

After starting the service website, you can select the user administration server.

 

 

User Administration

 

The users can either be created and configured locally or obtained via “Active Directory” connections. In addition, SSO settings are also possible.

The local attachment works by inviting the user by e-mail or by self-registration.

 

 

 

The prerequisite for this is that correct data is stored for a mail server in the gateway server setting.

 

As soon as the users have been created, they can be viewed and managed using user administration. Administration includes changing the username, setting a new password, deactivating, activating and deleting users. There is also a search function and when you select a user, the assigned groups are displayed.

This makes easy and efficient user management possible. Since only a small number of employees usually work with Tricentis Test Automation for SAP, these functions should be sufficient.

 

 

 

Groups in Tricentis Test Automation for SAP

 

To be able to map different access authorizations in the project, different groups can be created, and the users assigned to these groups. The groups can be structured hierarchically, that is, a group can belong to another group as a child and/or itself as a parent group can contain one or more child groups.

Users can be assigned to one or more groups.

I will describe the exact use of groups in the project in a separate block post.

In group management, you can create or delete groups with name and description. In addition, it can be assigned to child groups and parent groups.

 

 

Users can also be assigned on this place.

A link to “Project Administration” is used to assign the groups to projects.

 

 

With the group assignment and the option of inheriting group memberships using a parent-child relationship, there is a simple and powerful tool for using these groups for authorization checks in Tricentis Test Automation for SAP.

 

To ensure that the groups and users are also visible in the project after the assignment, they must be synchronized by an administrator in the Tosca Commander.

 

 

All groups and associated users that are assigned to the project are then available.

 

Conclusion

User administration provides a simple and efficient tool for centrally managing users and groups. This reduces the effort required in the project, allowing central user administration for several projects.
